title: SCP-173, The Sculpture
description: Don't break eye-contact, or SCP 173 will snap your neck
body:
The Sculpture adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-173 also known as The Scultpure or Peanut.


This concrete statue with rebar and a strangely unsettling face is not what it seems. When you’re staring at it, SCP-173 won't move. However, once you look away, it moves at incredible speeds and will make its way directly toward you. If it gets too close, it will either choke you to death or break your neck, resulting in an instant death... 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Why can SCP-173 still move when looking at it?

If you look at SCP-173, SCP-173 cannot move. However, if you stand too far away (approx. 60 blocks) the raycasting no longer works. The system behind raycasting is complicated and can sometimes lead to errors. 

If there are multiple SCP-173, raycasting can also fail.

► Where does SCP-173 spawn?

SCP-173 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-173

► How can i turn off blinking?

Blinking can be disabled when setting the gamerule "enableBlinking" to false

► Can I turn off SCP-173 Variants?

The Mexican & Peanut Variant can be turned off by setting the gamerule "allowSculptureVariants" to false

► Does SCP-173 Mod work with SCP-131 Mod?

Yes! Since version 1.9 the SCP-173 mod works with the SCP-131 mod. 

</details>



![SCP-173](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e7f29a77847208c7343eed6747eadf087595948.png)

SCP-173 is a statue-like entity made of concrete and rebar, with an unsettling face. As long as you keep your eyes on it, SCP-173 remains completely still, but the moment you look away or lose sight of it, it moves at terrifying speed. If SCP-173 gets too close, you might suffer the Choking effect, or worse, it can break your neck instantly. Blindness is especially dangerous, as SCP-173 will move freely until it comes back into your line of sight. Water doesn’t slow it down, and no conventional weapon can harm it, only a pickaxe is capable of dealing damage. There’s a rare Easter egg variant of SCP-173 that spawns wearing a sombrero and holding maracas, adding an unexpected twist to this deadly encounter.


 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
